constraints: Chat ordering/dedup fix lives in src/ui/src/components/chat-messages.ts: merge transcript + stream bubbles on a single unified ordering key instead of concatenating the two seq-sorted groups, and tighten the dedupe so a streamed turn and its persisted copy collapse to one bubble
intent.goal: Land a low-risk cleanup batch — the full logging/traceability hardening set, fixes for the workspace chat surface (unbounded growth, out-of-order turns, and duplicated assistant messages), and removal of the leaked agent-session transcript from PR #340 — capped by a patch version bump to 0.9.1.
non_goals: The plot-side EVENT_ACL.intent_edited widening (warren-df1b) — it spans the sibling ../plot repo and is out of scope for this warren-only batch
Investigation/forensics-only seeds with no code deliverable (warren-d5e5, PR #270 truthfulness audit)
The grandfathered file-size burndown refactor (warren-c65d) — large and explicitly one-per-patrol
New observability backends, dashboards, or metrics surfaces beyond the additive logging the audit (warren-3679) named
success_criteria: On the workspace conversation surface, user and agent turns render in correct chronological order across the transcript/stream boundary (no transcript-first-then-stream reordering)
No assistant message is duplicated when a streamed turn and its persisted transcript copy both exist; buildChatMessages dedupe is covered by a regression test in chat-messages.test.ts
